title: Tin Pan Alley
writer: Robert Ellis, Helen Logan, Pamela Harris
actors: Alice Faye, Betty Grable, Jack Oakie
plot: Songwriters Calhoun and Harrigan get Katie and Lily Blane to introduce a new one. Lily goes to England, and Katy joins her after the boys give a new song to Nora Bayes. All are reunited when the boys, now in the army, show up in E...
